pyqgis_plugin.name: QGIS RORB
pyqgis_plugin.description: Prepare GIS layers and build RORB/URBS control vectors from a catchment.
pyqgis_plugin.about: RORB Catchment Tools: preparation tools (auto-name subcatchments, centroids, confluences, reaches; check/clean links) and build tools (RORB .cat, URBS .vec+.cat). Requires pyromb>=0.3 for build tools.

pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB QGIS
pyqgis_plugin.description: View RORB results: browse .out files, plot hydrographs, export critical events.
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.4: Unified QGIS 3.x/4.x compatibility — PyQt5 and PyQt6 support via compat shim; matplotlib backend auto-selects Qt5/Qt6; fixes Compare tab crash. v2.37: Fix AEP label for EY events; correct EY sort order. v2.36: Fix hydrograph viewer crash. v2.35: Results viewer opens as floating window by default. v2.34: Remove rainfall from hydrograph viewer. v2.33: Rainfall overlay; dockable results viewer. v2.30: Persist scenarios; rename scenario.
